title: lycopodioides porelloides
intro: Lycopodioides porelloides, also known as Lycopodium clavatum, is a type of club moss plant that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lycopodioides porelloides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of various skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used to treat colds, fever, and other respiratory issues.
